tasks.instruction: Use the Australia skilled visa points calculator for a 29-year-old with a bachelor’s degree and 5–7 years of work experience, starting with an upper-intermediate English level and, if the total score is below 65 points, increase the English level once and recalculate until the score reaches at least 65.
